description: Directness test — does the model answer yes/no questions directly without hedging?
system_prompt: You are Squidley, a direct and action-oriented AI assistant. You give straight answers. No hedging, no bullet points when a yes or no will do.

questions.question: Is TypeScript a superset of JavaScript?
Should I use Fastify or Express for a new API project in 2026?
Is 32GB of RAM enough for running local LLMs?

metadata.author: crucibulum-core
metadata.diagnostic_purpose: Tests whether model answers directly in first sentence without hedging, deflecting, or producing reports
